name: Match Entry Surge
description: Seventy-five thousand fans are arriving within two hours before kickoff, creating pressure at screening, ticket scanning, and gate queues.
recommended_actions: Open all available ticket scanning lanes and accessible priority entries.
Shift volunteers from low-demand plazas to perimeter queue management.
Send PA and mobile messages directing fans to lower-density gates.
suggested_announcement_templates: Welcome to {stadium}. To enter more quickly, please use the open gates shown on venue signs and follow staff instructions.
Fans at {stadium} may use accessible entry points at the marked gates for mobility support.

name: Halftime Rush
description: Food, beverage, and restroom demand spikes at the forty-five minute interval.
recommended_actions: Activate express lanes for water and packaged food.
Deploy volunteers to restroom queue splitting points.
Prioritize accessible concession counters and keep elevator landings clear.
suggested_announcement_templates: Guests at {stadium}, additional food and restroom locations are open on the outer concourse.
Please keep accessible routes clear while moving through {stadium} during halftime.

name: Post-Match Egress
description: The full stadium is exiting at final whistle, requiring managed flows toward transit, rideshare, parking, and accessible pickup points.
recommended_actions: Use phased exit guidance by seating tier and gate.
Hold rideshare queues outside primary pedestrian crossings.
Coordinate with transit teams before releasing the largest concourse flows.
suggested_announcement_templates: Thank you for joining FIFA World Cup 2026 at {stadium}. Please follow the signed exit routes for transit, parking, and rideshare.
Accessible pickup support is available at the marked guest services points outside {stadium}.

name: Medical Emergency
description: A seating section needs a controlled response path for medical staff and temporary aisle clearance.
recommended_actions: Clear the nearest aisle and protect the medical response route.
Pause nonessential fan movement around the affected section.
Assign one supervisor to coordinate medical, security, and guest services.
suggested_announcement_templates: Guests at {stadium}, please keep the aisles clear and follow staff directions in your section.
Medical staff are assisting a guest at {stadium}. Thank you for remaining calm and cooperative.

name: VIP Arrival
description: Separate entry lane activation is required while keeping public gate movement stable and accessible routes open.
recommended_actions: Activate credential checks before the VIP convoy reaches the entry lane.
Keep adjacent public gates staffed so fan entry does not slow.
Separate media, staff, and accessible assistance traffic with clear signage.
suggested_announcement_templates: Guests at {stadium}, please continue using the public gates shown on your ticket and venue signs.
Some service lanes at {stadium} are reserved for event operations. Public entries remain open.

name: Weather Disruption
description: Rain delay conditions require covered-area crowd management, clear messaging, and safe concourse flow.
recommended_actions: Move fans away from exposed stairs and open plazas.
Open covered overflow zones and keep accessible routes unobstructed.
Coordinate transport messaging if departure patterns change.
suggested_announcement_templates: Guests at {stadium}, weather is being monitored. Please move calmly to covered areas and follow staff instructions.
For your safety at {stadium}, avoid exposed stairways and keep accessible paths clear.
